---
name: "[FEAT] Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature — title must start with [FEAT]
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case.

## Proposed Solution

How should it work? Include CLI examples or mockups if possible.

```bash
# Example usage
marmonitor <your-feature> --flag
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Context

- Which AI agents is this relevant to? (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, all)
- Which mode? (status, statusline, dock, watch, attention, jump, guard)
- Any related issues?
